TimeEntry.Title: Manage engine agent greyout issue for -ISI-HQ-AD-01 and WKISI01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines ISI-HQ-AD-01 and WKISI01 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: MyRMM Manage-Engine Latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) updated:-ISI-HQ-AD-01, ISI-HQ-APP-01, ISI-HQ-DB-01, ISI-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the My RMM portal, and found the machine ISI-HQ-AD-01, ISI-HQ-APP-01, ISI-HQ-DB-01, ISI-HQ-VBR-01 running with old version of Manage-Engine. So uninstalled the OLD version and downloaded and installed the latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) of the manage-engine agent. Verified from the portal, device is running with updated agent version.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patches updated on machine ISI-HQ-APP-01,ISI-HQ-VONE,ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and checked failed or missing patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed

the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then scan the machine for installed patches.

After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully and machine are in healthy state.

 

Machine : ISI-HQ-APP-01,ISI-HQ-VONE,ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VBR-01

Patch installed:

Patch ID Patch Name

357725 Adobe Acrobat Reader DC (x64) (26.001.21367)

357309 WizTree (4.31)

356968 PostgreSQL 15 (15.17-2)

TimeEntry.Title: Monthly Switch Backup for ISI
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed ISI Switch:-192.168.1.132 switch using putty and performed configuration backup. placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network- config-Switch folder. Hence, closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: The ISI-HQ-VONE server not communicating with central server.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the VSPC portal and found that the ISI-HQ-VONE server is not communicating properly with the central server. Logged into the server and then check and troubleshoot the issue on the server side and verified on the VSPC portal the server is communication without any issues.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.32.W - ISI-HQ-DB-01, ISI-HQ-APP-01, ISI-HQ-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Manage-Engine Latest version updated 11.5.2600.32.W - ISI-HQ-DB-01, ISI-HQ-APP-01, ISI-HQ-AD-01.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (V 26.1.25.9592 ) updated on machine ISI-HQ-VONE, ISI-HQ-AD-01,ISI-HQ-APP-01 & ISI-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and found that the computers machine  ISI-HQ-VONE, ISI-HQ-AD-01,ISI-HQ-APP-01 & ISI-HQ-VBR-01  were running an old version of ScreenConnect. update the software from the portal to the new version V 26.1.25.9592. After updating, verify that the version on the portal has been successfully updated to the latest version. Hence Closing this ticket .

TimeEntry.Title: Myremote version upgrade to Latest Version -26.1.25.9592 for ISI-HQ-DB-01, NEWWKISI5, WKISI01, WKISIFD01
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and found that the computers machine ISI-HQ-DB-01, NEWWKISI5, WKISI01, WKISIFD01 were running an old version of ScreenConnect. update the software from the portal to the new version V 26.1.25.9592. After updating, verify that the version on the portal has been successfully updated to the latest version. Hence Closing this ticket .

TimeEntry.Title: ISI-HQ-AD-01,ISI-HQ-APP-01 has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches.then no reboot require.Scanned the devices Some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.


 Patches Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise Current Channel for x86 2603 of version(19822.20168)
Google Chrome (x64) (147.0.7727.55,147.0.7727.56)
Mozilla Firefox (x64) (149.0.2)
Machines:  ISI-HQ-AD-01,ISI-HQ-APP-01

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.162 on :-ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VBR-01,ISI-HQ-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following machines on is old version V0.14.150 Connected to the machines ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VBR-01,ISI-HQ-AD-01 from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.162 After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed patches updated on machine ISI-HQ-VBR-01,ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the ticket. Login to the manage engine portal and checked failed or missing patches for the below mentioned machine then download and installed

the failed patches manually which are applicable to the computer. Then scan the machine for installed patches.

After scan Check and verify the machine with the MY RMM portal. The failed patches are updated successfully and machine are in healthy state.

 

Machine : ISI-HQ-VBR-01,ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VONE

Patch installed:

Patch ID Patch Name

357851 Google Chrome (x64) (147.0.7727.55,147.0.7727.56)

357880 Mozilla Firefox (x64) (149.0.2)

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on WKISI01
TimeEntry.Notes: Huntress Agent updated with Version 0.14.162, replaced with Version 0.14.150 on WKISI01

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Synchronization Issue for ISI Machine ISI-HQ-DB-01 and ISI-HQ-APP-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines ISI-HQ-DB-01 and ISI-HQ-APP-01 not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Backup location [ISI-HQ-NAS-01\ISI_BKP] is having issue with disk space
TimeEntry.Notes: During monitoring, I found that the backup count for the VMs was high for the ISI. I checked and found on the VBR server that the issue was with the NAS, which was showing 258 TB of used space while the total capacity was 5.4 TB. It has been cleaned up the repo, rescanned, and updated. It currently shows updated space and has started the syncing with the VSPC portal; it will show the correct count.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version(7.36.20805.0)updated on machines : ISI-HQ-DB-01 and ISI-HQ-VBR-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Crowd strike portal to check the machines with outdated version. Found machines ISI-HQ-DB-01 and ISI-HQ-VBR-01 running with older version of crowd strike. So connected to machines and uninstalled the old version and downloaded and installed the latest sensor version (7.36.20805.0) of CrowdStrike, verified from the portal. it is updated now. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Crowdstrike latest version (7.36.20805.0) updated on machine:- ISI-HQ-AD-01, ISI-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to the machines through my rmm (ISI-HQ-AD-01, ISI-HQ-VONE) and discovered they were running an older version of CrowdStrike. Attempted to push the sensor from the portal, but the process was unsuccessful.so connect to the system and uninstalled the older version, downloaded, and installed the latest sensor version (7.36.20805.0) on these machines. Verified the update through the portal. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: WKISIFD01: Manually update Cisco Umbrella as APD missed to update
TimeEntry.Notes:
WKISIFD01

  • Accessed the machine and verified the existing Cisco Umbrella version.
  • Downloaded the latest version: Cisco Secure Client (cisco-secure-client-win-5.1.16.194).
  • Successfully deployed and updated Cisco Umbrella manually.
  • Initiated a re-scan via MyRMM; the update is now reflected and confirmed.
  • System is up to date with the latest patch.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Restart server After APD to deploy the patches (ISI-HQ-DB-01, ISI-HQ-APP-01, and ISI-HQ-VBR-01)
TimeEntry.Notes:
Devices ISI-HQ-DB-01, ISI-HQ-APP-01, and ISI-HQ-VBR-01 were identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.

Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on all affected systems. Proceeded with patch remediation by installing the following updates:

  • 2026-04 Cumulative Update for Windows Server 2019 (x64) – KB5082123
  • Security Update for SQL Server 2017 RTM CU – KB5084818
  • Microsoft Malicious Software Removal Tool (x64) – April 2026 – KB890830
  • 2026-04 Cumulative Update for .NET Framework 3.5 and 4.8 for Windows Server 2019 (x64) – KB5082414
  • Additional Update – KB5084066

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on all systems to verify successful deployment and to clear the non-compliant status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. All systems are now compliant as per patch management.

TimeEntry.Title: The MyRemote agent was unresponsive on ISI-HQ-DB-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to my remote session and observed that the screen was freezing while attempting to log in to the server. Accessed the server via MyRMM and checked the ScreenConnect service. Restarted the service and verified the functionality. The issue is now resolved, and the ticket is being closed.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Umbrella Agent Syncing Issue with Portal for machines ISI-HQ-APP-01,ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VBR-01,ISI-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the Cisco Umbrella portal and identified that machines ISI-HQ-APP-01,ISI-HQ-DB-01,ISI-HQ-VBR-01,ISI-HQ-VONE
were experiencing syncing issues with the Cisco Umbrella portal. I then connected to the affected machines and addressed the network connectivity settings. After ensuring proper communication between the agent and the portal, the agent is now successfully syncing and communicating with the Cisco Umbrella cloud, with the correct status and configuration reflected in the portal.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - ISI-HQ-VONE
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server ISI-HQ-VONE is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine agent is corrupted and needs to be reinstalled on the machines:- WKISI6
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked the ManageEngine portal and found that ManageEngine could not scan the machines below due to error code 12029. Upon logging into the machines, observed the agent icon grayed out in the system tray. Subsequently, reinstalled the agent on the WKISI6 machines, which are now synced on the portal. Hence, closing the ticket
